'''Alfie Edgell''' (born 25 July 2004) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|fb}} or {{rlp|wg}}er for the [[Leeds Rhinos]] in the [[Betfred Super League]].

==Background==
Edgell played for [[Kippax Welfare ARLFC]] as a junior.<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/nextgen-alfie-edgell-the-leeds-rhinos-full-back-who-grew-up-idolising-danny-mcguire NextGen: Alfie Edgell – the Leeds Rhinos full-back who grew up idolising Danny McGuire]</ref>

==Career==
Edgell made his [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] debut in the [[Super League]] against the [[Castleford Tigers]] in 2023.<ref>[https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/still-pinch-myself-every-day-leeds-rhinos-starlet-alfie-edgell-on-dream-super-league-debut-and-taking-big-chance-4479989 'Still pinch myself every day': Leeds Rhinos starlet Alfie Edgell on dream Super League debut and taking big chance]</ref>
